description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a rectangular main structure and an attached garage featuring a sloped red roof. The main building has a flat roof and a balcony on the upper floor, with multiple windows distributed across all sides. The front facade includes a covered entryway, a single main door, and a large window, while the garage has a separate door and a driveway. The rear and side elevations are simpler, with fewer windows and minimal decorative elements. The house's exterior is primarily composed of light red brick, with white window frames and a tiled ground surface at the back.
description: A two-story brick house with a flat roof, attached garage, balcony, and multiple windows, featuring a modern rectangular design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, garage with sloped roof, and balcony above.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the plain brick wall, upper windows, and the edge of the balcony.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a tiled patio, several windows, and two back doors.
description_view_3: Right side view with the garage's sloped roof, side windows, and a secondary entrance.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered main entry with a single door, adjacent window, and a small porch under the balcony.
